description_long: This house features a compact, rectangular main structure with a flat roof and a long, low extension running perpendicular to the main building. The main section has a simple, modernist design with minimal ornamentation and a clean, geometric profile. Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern on the visible facades, providing ample natural light. The entryway is understated, with a single door and no visible porch or steps, emphasizing the minimalist aesthetic. The exterior appears to be finished in a uniform, light-colored material, likely concrete or stucco, contributing to the contemporary look. The overall form is functional and streamlined, suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a long, low extension and symmetrical window placement, finished in a light material. The design is minimalist and geometric, with a simple entryway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main rectangular structure with the entryway and a long, low extension stretching horizontally.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the main building and the length of the extension, with visible window placements.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the main structure and the extension, with symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the extension's length and the side facade of the main building, with minimal detailing.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with no porch or steps, minimalistic and flush with the facade
